remarks: Welcome to 1015 Boston Post Road, a beautifully appointed 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment ideally located in the heart of Darien. Just moments from the town's restaurants, boutiques, and everyday conveniences, this home offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and accessibility. Inside, an open-concept floor plan seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, creating an inviting space that's ideal for both relaxing and entertaining. The living room features soaring ceilings and oversized windows that fill the home with natural light, enhancing its bright and airy feel. The kitchen is complete with marble countertops, a breakfast bar, and ample cabinetry, while the adjacent dining area provides the perfect setting for everyday meals or hosting friends. An in-unit washer and dryer adds to the home's everyday convenience. Perfectly situated for commuters, the apartment is within walking distance of the Darien train station and just minutes from I-95, making travel effortless. Enjoy everything Darien has to offer from this exceptional location where shopping, dining, and transportation are all just outside your door.
